title: Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
company: Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners:
Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners!
